mapper.select:
SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.accept_status, o.delivery_status, o.created_at, b.company_name AS business_nickname FROM orders o LEFT JOIN business b ON b.business_id = o.business_id LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.customer_deleted = 0
AND ( o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR b.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
OR c.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN kit k ON k.kit_id = oi.kit_id LEFT JOIN bids bd ON bd.bid_id = o.bid_id LEFT JOIN request r ON r.request_id = bd.request_id WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND ( k.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') ) ) )
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o LEFT JOIN business b ON b.business_id = o.business_id LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.customer_deleted = 0
AND ( o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR b.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR c.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN kit k ON k.kit_id = oi.kit_id LEFT JOIN bids bd ON bd.bid_id = o.bid_id LEFT JOIN request r ON r.request_id = bd.request_id WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND ( k.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') ) ) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.bid_id IS NULL AND o.accept_status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'REJECTED')
AND c.login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND c.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND c.phone_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND DATE(o.created_at) >= #{search.startDate}
AND DATE(o.created_at) <= #{search.endDate}

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.accept_status, o.delivery_status, o.created_at, cr.room_id, r.request_id, b.company_name AS business_nickname FROM orders o LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.bid_id = o.bid_id AND cr.customer_id = o.customer_id AND cr.business_id = o.business_id LEFT JOIN bids bd ON bd.bid_id = o.bid_id LEFT JOIN request r ON r.request_id = bd.request_id LEFT JOIN business b ON b.business_id = o.business_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.customer_deleted = 0

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.kit_id, o.business_id, oi.quantity, oi.price, COALESCE(k.name, r.title, '개인거래 상품') AS product_name, COALESCE(k.main_image1, a.image_url) AS image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM review rv WHERE rv.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id) AS reviewed, (SELECT rv.review_id FROM review rv WHERE rv.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id LIMIT 1) AS review_id FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN kit k ON k.kit_id = oi.kit_id LEFT JOIN bids bd ON bd.bid_id = o.bid_id LEFT JOIN request r ON r.request_id = bd.request_id LEFT JOIN attachment a ON a.ref_type = 'REQ' AND a.ref_id = r.request_id AND a.is_thumbnail = 1 WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.accept_status, o.delivery_status, o.created_at, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, b.company_name AS business_nickname FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN business b ON b.business_id = o.business_id WHERE o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.accept_status = 'PENDING' AND o.bid_id IS NULL ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET accept_status = #{acceptStatus} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, kit_id, quantity, price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{kitId}, #{quantity}, #{price})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.room_id = cm.room_id JOIN orders o ON o.bid_id = cr.bid_id AND o.customer_id = cr.customer_id AND o.business_id = cr.business_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND cm.is_read = 0 AND cm.sender_type = 'BUSINESS'
